root.title: OnExotic — Not fashion. Hierarchy.
root.description: Official OnExotic store. Limited drops of gymwear, oversize and streetwear, made in Lima. When it's gone, it's gone.
root.keywords: onexotic, peru streetwear, lima gymwear, peru oversize, limited drops, lima fashion

meta.title: Terms and conditions
meta.description: Legal terms governing purchases at OnExotic. Orders, prices, shipping and returns.

terms.title: Terms and conditions
terms.intro: These terms govern the use of onexotic.shop and purchases made through the store. By placing an order you accept these conditions.

object.title: Purpose
object.body: OnExotic SAC, based in Lima, Peru, operates the store at onexotic.shop. We sell clothing through limited drops, no restock. The operation is governed by Peruvian laws, in particular the Consumer Protection Code (Law 29571).

orders.title: Orders
orders.body: An order is accepted when the customer receives confirmation by email or WhatsApp with an OX-… number. The order discounts stock in real time. If a piece is sold without stock due to a technical error, OnExotic notifies the customer within 48 hours and refunds the payment.

prices.title: Prices and payments
prices.body: Prices include applicable taxes and are expressed in Peruvian soles (PEN). We accept payment via WhatsApp (Yape, Plin, transfer) and soon via Culqi (card, Yape, Plin). The customer is responsible for import taxes on international shipments.

shipping.title: Shipping
shipping.body: We ship throughout Peru and abroad. Costs and timelines are detailed on the Shipping page. Risk of loss or damage transfers to the customer upon delivery to the carrier.

returns.title: Returns and exchanges
returns.body: You have 7 days from receipt to request an exchange or return, unused and with the original tag. Details on the Returns page.

liability.title: Liability
liability.body: OnExotic is liable for manufacturing defects within legal terms. We are not responsible for misuse, washing outside instructions, or indirect damages.

jurisdiction.title: Jurisdiction
jurisdiction.body: Any dispute is resolved in the courts of Lima, Peru. The customer may also approach INDECOPI or use our virtual Complaints Book.

meta.title: Privacy policy
meta.description: How OnExotic collects, uses and protects its customers' personal data.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: We explain what data we collect, why we collect it and what you can do with it. We process your information under Peru's Personal Data Protection Law (Law 29733).

controller.title: Data controller
controller.body: OnExotic SAC, Lima, Peru. Contact: onexotic2005@gmail.com. We process your data as controller under Law 29733.

data.title: Data we collect
data.body: Name, last name, email, phone, shipping address, order history. For drop subscriptions we only store your email. We do not store card data; payment gateways (Culqi) process it directly.

purpose.title: Purpose
purpose.body: Process orders, coordinate shipments, handle claims, notify upcoming drops to subscribers, improve the store via anonymized analytics (Vercel Analytics).

sharing.title: Sharing
sharing.body: Only with those necessary to deliver the service: shipping companies, payment gateway and email provider. We do not sell your data to third parties.

rights.title: Your ARCO rights
rights.body: You can access, rectify, cancel or oppose the processing of your data by writing to onexotic2005@gmail.com. We respond within 20 business days max.

security.title: Security
security.body: Data lives in Supabase with encryption at rest and in transit. We apply Row Level Security so each customer only sees their information.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For privacy queries: onexotic2005@gmail.com · WhatsApp +51 906 517 394. You may also approach Peru's National Personal Data Protection Authority.

meta.title: Returns and exchanges
meta.description: OnExotic returns and exchanges policy. 7 days from receipt, unworn with tag attached.

returns.title: Returns and exchanges
returns.intro: If the piece doesn't fit or arrived defective, we exchange it or refund you. Here are the clear rules.

window.title: Window
window.body: You have 7 calendar days from receipt of the order to request an exchange or return. After that, no requests are accepted except for visible manufacturing defects.

conditions.title: Conditions
conditions.body: The piece must be unworn, unwashed, free of stains and odors, with the original tag attached and inside the bag. If used or damaged by the customer, we reject the return.

process.title: How to request it
process.body: Write us via WhatsApp (+51 906 517 394) with the order number and a photo of the piece. We coordinate pick-up or you bring it to our Lima address. Resolved within 5 business days.

refund.title: Refund
refund.body: Once approved, we refund through the same payment method within 7 business days max. If you paid via WhatsApp we use Yape or transfer.

shipping.title: Return shipping cost
shipping.body: If the piece arrived defective or with a sizing error on our end, OnExotic covers the return shipping. For voluntary exchanges the customer covers it.

noReturn.title: Exceptions
noReturn.body: For hygiene reasons we don't accept exchanges or returns on boxers or underwear. Also not on sale pieces marked as final sale.

meta.title: Shipping and delivery
meta.description: OnExotic shipping costs and times. Lima, Peru provinces and international.

shipping.title: Shipping and delivery
shipping.intro: We ship throughout Peru and abroad. Here are the zones, costs, timelines and how to track your order.

zones.title: Shipping zones
zones.body: Lima Metropolitan, Peru provinces and international. The system calculates the cost automatically at checkout based on the chosen address.

times.title: Timelines
times.body: Orders confirmed before 2 pm are processed the same day. Times above are counted from the day of dispatch, not from confirmation.

tracking.title: Tracking
tracking.body: Each order has its own page at /pedidos/[id] with its real-time status (pending, confirmed, in preparation, shipped, delivered). We notify you as it progresses.

failed.title: Failed delivery
failed.body: If you're not in when the courier arrives, they try a second visit. After the second failed visit, the piece returns to our workshop and we coordinate a new shipment with extra cost.

international.title: International shipping
international.body: International shipments are charged at a flat rate and are NOT eligible for the free-shipping threshold (which applies only within Peru — Lima Metropolitana and provincia). The shipping cost does not include import taxes from the destination country: those costs are borne by the customer upon receiving the package.

risk.title: Risk and insurance
risk.body: We pack each piece with protective material. If it arrives damaged by the carrier, report within 48 hours with photos to start a claim.

meta.title: Complaints book
meta.description: OnExotic's mandatory virtual complaints book, in accordance with Peruvian legislation.

claims.title: Complaints book
claims.intro: Pursuant to the Consumer Protection Code (Law 29571) and Supreme Decree 011-2011-PCM, we make this virtual book available to you. Your claim or complaint is registered and answered within 30 calendar days max.
claims.legalCite: * Claim: dissatisfaction with product/service. Complaint: discomfort with service.

fields.name: First name
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe in detail what happened, dates and what you expect as a solution…

claims.legalNote: By submitting you declare the information is truthful. OnExotic respects the legal 30-day response timeline.

errors.description_too_short: Detail must be at least 20 characters.

success.title: It's on record.
success.copy: We'll respond to your email within 30 calendar days max. Save this number as reference.

reviews.title: {count} reviews
reviews.emptyTitle: Be the first to review this chapter
reviews.emptyCopy: Once your piece lands, come back and tell us how it fell. Each review helps the next followers.

meta.title: FAQ
meta.description: Shipping times and costs, garment care, returns, sizes, upcoming drops and payment methods at OnExotic.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.intro: Most-asked questions, in one page. If it's not here, message us on WhatsApp or via the contact form.
faq.moreCopy: Write to us and we'll answer without delay.

shippingPeru.question: How long and how much is shipping in Peru?
shippingPeru.answer: Metropolitan Lima: 1–3 business days after dispatch. Regional Peru: 3–7 business days. Free shipping above S/ 250 within Peru; below the threshold, fees apply per zone (Lima from S/ 15, Regional from S/ 25).

shippingIntl.question: Do you ship outside Peru?
shippingIntl.answer: Yes. Fixed-rate international shipping, 7–20 business days depending on destination. Import duties are not included and are paid by the customer on delivery. The free-shipping threshold applies only within Peru.

care.question: How do I care for the garment?
care.answer: Cold wash, inside out, short cycle. Iron inside out at medium heat. Skip the dryer; your piece will last twice as long.

returns.question: Can I exchange or return?
returns.answer: Within 7 days of delivery, unused, with original tag. For voluntary exchanges the customer covers return shipping; if it was our defect, we cover it.

sizes.question: How do I pick my size?
sizes.answer: Measurements live on each product. Open the size guide for cm/inches and how to measure yourself. If in doubt between two sizes, size up: the silhouette is oversize.

nextDrops.question: When is the next drop?
nextDrops.answer: The cult finds out first. Subscribe with your email on home or the archive and we'll ping you before launch. No restock.

payments.question: Which payment methods do you accept?
payments.answer: For now, coordinated via WhatsApp (Yape, Plin, transfer). Online payments via Culqi (card, Yape, Plin) coming soon.

guest.question: Can I check out without an account?
guest.answer: Yes. At checkout pick 'Continue as guest': you place the order via WhatsApp and get a copy by email. If you want a history, create an account first.

meta.description: Reach us on WhatsApp, email or the contact form. The cult answers.

guide.howChest: Chest: around the fullest part, arms relaxed.
guide.howWaist: Waist: above the navel, don't tighten.
guide.howLength: Length: from shoulder to lowest hem.
guide.note: ◦ We accept returns within 7 days, unused.

manifesto.rest: Bodies dressed to resist the algorithm, the block and the silence. Each piece weighs what the ritual weighs: 500 grams of vengeance against fast fashion.

quote.line2: so no one would see me fall."

spread.copy: Each piece is born from a different sermon. Each body carries it as its own.

hero.copyAccent: turned the block into an altar.

cap01.title: A Lima kitchen.
cap01.lede: Three friends. A borrowed sewing machine. Forty soles for fabric. Nothing else.

p1.d: designed flyers for clubs that didn't pay her. All three shared one obsession: Lima street had visual codes unique in the world, and nobody was wearing them.

cap01.p2: The first five pieces were made by hand in a borrowed kitchen. Sold via DM in a week. The sixth we couldn't finish: we ran out of cotton.

quote1.text: "We didn't want a brand. We wanted a church."

cap02.title: "OnExotic" wasn't a name. It was an insult.
cap02.p1: A customer wrote us in August 2025: «your designs are too on exotic for Lima, bro». He meant excessive. He meant out of place.
cap02.p2: We kept the word. We drew it as attack. If being from Lima and dressing different was exotic, we'd push the line until it broke.

m1.n: Black hoodie by hand, sold via DM for S/ 140.

m2.n: A client calls us "on exotic". We took the name.

m3.n: 40 pieces. Sold out in hours. No restock.

m4.n: We took a room in Gamarra. In-house seamstresses.

m5.n: {closed} closed chapters. The next is brewing.

p1.d: A piece sold is a piece less. When it's gone, it's gone. No exceptions.

p2.d: Everything is cut and sewn in Gamarra. No cheap labor, no middlemen.

p3.t: The client is faithful, not consumer.
p3.d: Early access, not discounts. Community, not segmentation.

p4.d: Design decisions are made walking, not staring at dashboards.

s1.d: Monday meetings. One notebook. No Photoshop until step 03.

s2.d: Paper patterns, raw cotton test. If it doesn't fall, it gets shredded.

s3.d: Hand embroidery on the main piece. Three inks max.

s4.d: Photo. Manifesto. Word to the faithful. No restock.

close.copy: This is just starting. If you got this far, you're part of the next chapter already.
